_comment: Copy to ~/.config/kwin-fancyzones/zones.json and edit. x/y/width/height are percentages of the screen work area. Zones may overlap (nearest-center wins). Define one or more named layouts and pick the active one with activeLayout (a name or 0-based index). Re-login or 'kwin_wayland --replace' (or change any KWin setting) to reload. A single-layout shorthand is also accepted: { "zones": [ ... ] }.
